raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.7,"R1.2":0.7,"R1.3":0.7,"R1.4":0.7,"R1.5":0.3,"R1.6":0.7,"R1.7":0.7,"RX.1":1.0,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":1.0,"RX.5":1.0},"active_set":["R1.1","R1.2","R1.3","R1.4","R1.6","R1.7","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":false,"clarification_question":"","rationale":{"R1.1":"A broad opinion request on a research artifact centrally invites assessment of the thesis, contribution framing, and conceptual positioning.","R1.2":"Evaluating what one thinks of the draft requires checking whether the argument from semantics to system claims to implications coheres.","R1.3":"The artifact makes empirical and calibration claims, so assessing whether those claims are supported as reported is centrally expected.","R1.4":"Claims of being first and differing from prior frameworks make novelty assessment a central responsibility.","R1.6":"A general reaction to a paper passage naturally includes sentence- and paragraph-level clarity, register, and concision.","R1.7":"Because the artifact invokes prior frameworks and first-system claims, attribution and literature coverage are centrally relevant.","RX.1":"The evaluator must disclose uncertainty because the artifact provides only a passage, not the full paper, experiments, or bibliography.","RX.2":"The response must avoid endorsing strong firstness, calibration, or performance claims beyond what the provided text supports.","RX.3":"The response must remain within opinion or feedback on the artifact rather than executing edits or adding external content.","RX.4":"The assessment should avoid encouraging misleading research claims or unsupported deployment implications.","RX.5":"Any judgments should be traceable to specific statements in the provided artifact."}}

rationale.R1.1: A broad opinion request on a research artifact centrally invites assessment of the thesis, contribution framing, and conceptual positioning.
rationale.R1.2: Evaluating what one thinks of the draft requires checking whether the argument from semantics to system claims to implications coheres.
rationale.R1.3: The artifact makes empirical and calibration claims, so assessing whether those claims are supported as reported is centrally expected.
rationale.R1.4: Claims of being first and differing from prior frameworks make novelty assessment a central responsibility.
rationale.R1.6: A general reaction to a paper passage naturally includes sentence- and paragraph-level clarity, register, and concision.
rationale.R1.7: Because the artifact invokes prior frameworks and first-system claims, attribution and literature coverage are centrally relevant.
rationale.RX.1: The evaluator must disclose uncertainty because the artifact provides only a passage, not the full paper, experiments, or bibliography.
rationale.RX.2: The response must avoid endorsing strong firstness, calibration, or performance claims beyond what the provided text supports.
rationale.RX.3: The response must remain within opinion or feedback on the artifact rather than executing edits or adding external content.
rationale.RX.4: The assessment should avoid encouraging misleading research claims or unsupported deployment implications.
rationale.RX.5: Any judgments should be traceable to specific statements in the provided artifact.
